svg.text: Jakarta River Monitoring Station - System Overview
AC-Powered PoE Camera System with 24hr Battery Backup | OpenRiverCam Indonesia Spring 2026
VEVOR ELECTRONICS ENCLOSURE (IP66, 16x12x8in, DIN rail mounting)
Wall mount: L-brackets + SS banding + EPDM pads on concrete wall
Cat6 outdoor shielded + IP68 RJ45 coupler
Cat6 outdoor shielded + IP68 RJ45 coupler
1. Stack Order: Pi 5 (bottom) + Witty Pi 5 HAT+ (middle) + Geekworm G469 (top) - DIN rail clip mount
2. Apply MG 422C silicone conformal coat to: Pi 5, Witty Pi 5, G469. Mask connectors/headers
3. DDR-60G-5: Regulated 5V for compute (12V bus varies with battery charge state)
4. LINOVISION PoE switch: Native 12V input, powers both cameras continuously (not duty-cycled)
5. PTC heaters: Self-regulating. Enclosure 15W with hygrostat (>70%RH). Camera 5-7W with thermostat
6. DS18B20 (outside) feeds dew point calculation → controls PTC heaters above dew point
7. Pi 5 built-in RTC (ML-2020 coin cell) is primary. Witty Pi 5 provides backup scheduling/power mgmt
8. Battery box separate from electronics. Short 12V DC cable run between boxes
9. Victron BatteryProtect: LVD @ 11.5V disconnect, 12.8V reconnect, prevents deep discharge
GPIO 4 Witty Pi Resrvd Backup scheduling interrupt
GPIO 14 UART TX Serial To Hydreon RG-15 RX
GPIO 15 UART RX Serial From Hydreon RG-15 TX
GPIO 17 Green LED Output System OK
GPIO 23 Button Input Maintenance mode (3s hold)
DDR-60G: built-in OCP/OVP | Victron BP: LVD protection
